# Daily Report — 2026-04-08

## Task Completed
Extracted three duplicated helper functions (`_get_instance_url`, `_get_headers`,
`_unwrap_and_validate_params`) that were copy-pasted across 8 tool files into a single
shared module `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/helpers.py`. Each of the 8 files now imports
from the shared module instead of defining its own local copies.

Files cleaned up: `change_tools.py`, `changeset_tools.py`, `epic_tools.py`,
`project_tools.py`, `scrum_task_tools.py`, `sctask_tools.py`, `story_tools.py`,
`time_card_tools.py`.

The unified `_unwrap_and_validate_params` combines the best behaviour from both
implementation variants (Pydantic model passthrough from the changeset version +
`{"params": {...}}` envelope unwrapping from the others).

Lines removed: ~740 lines of duplicated code.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 371 passed, 4 deselected
- Coverage: 87%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Vulnerabilities found in environment packages (pip 24.0, setuptools 68.1.2, pyjwt 2.7.0,
wheel 0.42.0) — all pre-existing system packages, none introduced by this change.

## Lint
Clean after ruff auto-fixed 12 minor issues (unused imports removed by ruff, one
unused variable in a test removed manually).
